inputs.label: Total Warehouse Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area of the warehouse. Based on WERC DC Measures and ISO 9001 space utilization standards.

inputs.label: Usable Storage Area
inputs.businessContext: Area actually used for storage. Lean principles emphasize eliminating wasted space (Muda).

inputs.label: Annual Rent per m²
inputs.businessContext: Market rental rate per square meter per year. Based on industry benchmarks from JLL, CBRE.

inputs.label: Operating Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Includes utilities, maintenance, labor, etc. ISO 50001 energy costs considered.

inputs.label: Inventory Turnover
inputs.businessContext: Number of times inventory is sold and replaced per year. APICS standard metric.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average monetary value of inventory held. Used to calculate carrying cost.

inputs.label: Carrying Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory as percentage of value. Typically 20-30% (industry standard).

inputs.label: Waste Space Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of space wasted due to poor layout, obsolete inventory, etc. Lean Six Sigma metric.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final output.

thresholds.wasteSpacePercent > 20: Critical: Waste space exceeds 20% - immediate layout review needed.
thresholds.inventoryTurnover < 4: Warning: Low inventory turnover indicates overstocking or obsolescence.
thresholds.carryingCostRate > 30: Warning: Carrying cost rate above industry norm.

suggestedActions: Implement Lean 5S to reduce waste space.
Review inventory management to improve turnover.
Consider vertical storage or automation to increase usable area.
Negotiate rent or relocate to lower-cost facility.
